name: llamadrive
description: LlamaDrive plugin marketplace for Japanese law firms. Currently hosts bengo-toolkit (court templates, family tree generation 相続関係説明図, document proofreading, lawsuit analysis, deterministic legal calculators, e-Gov law search, tamper-evident local audit logs). Future LlamaDrive plugins will be added here.

plugins.name: bengo-toolkit
plugins.description: Japanese law firm plugin for Claude Code — court template filling, family tree generation (相続関係説明図), legal document proofreading, lawsuit analysis, e-Gov law search, and deterministic legal calculators (traffic damages, child support, debt recalc, overtime, iryubun, property division, inheritance). Ships HMAC-chained, append-only local audit logs (tamper-evident records of which documents were processed, when, and by which skill — without storing document contents). 日本の法律事務所向け Claude Code プラグイン — 裁判所書式入力・相続関係説明図・訴訟分析・法令検索・決定論的計算（交通事故・養育費・遺留分等）。
